name: Dan Wake
intro: A light Hausa meal that consists of little bean flour dumplings dressed in fresh vegetables and the signature suya spice. This makes for a delicious lunch. Instead of fresh vegetables, it can also be served with stir-fried veggies or a veggie sauce of your choice.

ingredients.item: and 1/2 cups beans flour 1/2 cup cassava flour

method: In a large bowl, combine the beans flour, cassava flour, kuka and baking soda. Add the water very slowly and mix until you have a thick dough.
Serve hot with a topping of tomatoes, onions, cucumbers and shredded cabbage. Drizzle some groundnut oil over the top and sprinkle some suya spice and a pinch of salt to season.
